autoWithdraw.title: Auto Withdrawal Configuration
autoWithdraw.enableAutoWithdrawDesc: Orders meeting ALL conditions below can auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.maxWithdrawAmountDesc: Ex: set 100 means amount > 100 cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.dayProfitAmountDesc: Ex: set 5000 means (payout - bet) > 5000 cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.manualRechargeOf3DayDesc: Ex: set 10000 means 3-day manual deposit total > 10000 cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.balanceDesc: Ex: set 1000 means balance >= 1000 cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.firstDepositAmountDesc: Ex: set 1000 means first deposit >= 1000 cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.sameDeviceRegistCountDesc: Ex: set 3 means device count > 3 cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.maxWithdrawRechargeRateDesc: Ex: set 2.1 means total withdrawal > 2.1x total deposit cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.maxWithdrawTimeDesc: Ex: set 2 means after last deposit already withdrew once cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.grandWithdrawTotalDesc: Ex: set 5 means total withdrawals < 5 cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.sameIpRegistCountDesc: Ex: set 3 means accounts linked by IP >= 3 cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.sameBankAccountCountDesc: Ex: set 2 means bank account links >= 2 cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.totalRechargeAmountDesc: Ex: choose > & set 1000 means total deposit <= 1000 cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.totalWinLoseAmountDesc: Ex: set 5000 means total profit >= 5000 cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.autoWithdrawFailCountDesc: If user auto withdrawal fail count exceeds this, cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.totalCodingAmountMultipleDesc: User total valid bet / total deposit multiple; if less than value cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.needFirstRechargeDesc: If enabled, users without first deposit cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.needUserNoRemarkDesc: If enabled, users WITH a remark cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.allowVirtualWithdrawDesc: If enabled, crypto withdrawals can auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.allowInvitedWheelAutoWithdrawDesc: If enabled, wheel-invited users can auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.checkRiskListDesc: If enabled, users in risk list cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.checkBlackListUserIdAndIp: Blacklist User / Order IP in blacklist
autoWithdraw.checkBlackListUserIdAndIpDesc: If enabled, blacklisted user or IP cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.needLimitGroupDesc: If enabled, only selected groups can auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.checkLowOddsOrderRatioDesc: If enabled, low odds bet ratio check; if matched cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.checkRejectPackageDesc: If enabled, selected source channels cannot auto withdraw
autoWithdraw.selectChannelSources: Select source channels NOT allowed for auto withdrawal
autoWithdraw.inputChannelRuleName: Please enter the channel rule name
autoWithdraw.selectUnChannelSources: Select the channel sources to apply this rule (multiple selections allowed)
autoWithdraw.deleteRuleContent: Are you sure you want to delete this channel rule? The deleted channel will follow the default channel rule.

broadcastRobot.largeRechargeThresholdDesc: Deposits above this amount treated as large; broadcast successful deposit orders
broadcastRobot.withdrawChannelIntervalDesc: Minimum interval between withdrawal data broadcasts
broadcastRobot.largeWithdrawThresholdDesc: Withdrawals above this treated as large; broadcast on initiation
broadcastRobot.maxChannelBalanceWarningAmountDesc: Trigger warning when channel balance below threshold
broadcastRobot.channelBalanceWarningIntervalDesc: Minimum interval between warnings for same channel

broadcastRobot.enableWithdrawChannelRateNotify: Enable withdrawal channel success rate report

clockCorrection.title: Correct Work Time
clockCorrection.warning: * After correction, performance data will be recalculated using the latest work time range.
clockCorrection.rule1: 1. The interval between start and end time must be <= 24 hours;
clockCorrection.rule2: 2. The start time cannot be earlier than the end time of the previous shift;
clockCorrection.rule3: 3. The end time cannot be later than the start time of the next shift;
clockCorrection.success: Work time corrected successfully. Performance data will be recalculated.

validation.invalidRange: End time must be later than start time

rules.timeoutText: The processing timeout for a single order is 5 minutes
rules.pauseText: When paused, current orders return to the dispatch queue. New orders will be redispatched after the pause ends.
rules.clockText: Clock-in only marks attendance. After clocking in, click Start Dispatch to receive payout orders. Before clocking out, complete current orders or pause to clear them. You may clock out when no orders are in progress, or after 12 hours of work.

descriptions.manualRechargeStrategy: This page keeps the prototype structure for manual deposit entry, approval permissions, and audit workflow. All interactions are static for now and do not write live data.
descriptions.manualPriorityValue: Prioritize compensation, reconciliation and withdrawal return scenarios
descriptions.manualScopeValue: Currently scoped to finance shifts and supervisors; later we can narrow it with real permission data
descriptions.manualRiskValue: Repeated amounts, abnormal sources and high-frequency requests enter the recheck queue
descriptions.manualBatchTip: Batch deposit keeps the merchant prototype's import entry and result list. The current version shows static import results only and does not update live balances.
descriptions.memberProfileTip: The member profile card preserves the merchant prototype's account snapshot and same-day fund info for quick verification before submitting a request.
descriptions.broadcastRobotStrategy: The broadcast bot section preserves the prototype structure and currently shows static summaries that can be replaced with real forms later.
descriptions.autoWithdrawStrategy: Auto withdrawal currently syncs the prototype rule structure and guidance text only. No live approval logic runs yet.
